title: ollama/ollama
summary: Get up and running with Llama 3.3, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama. Easily run and interact with models in Python.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama. Works in Node.js and browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama models, enabling chains, agents, and retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich, self-hosted WebUI for Ollama supporting code highlighting, RAG, multimodal, and more.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API and Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust client library for Ollama with async support and strong typing.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama API.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-enhanced CLI with interactive chat, model search, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models as GitHub Copilot replacements.
